page.content: The data presented in the table provides a comprehensive overview of temperature and precipitation metrics over a series of years, highlighting the changes observed in a specific location characterized as a "Bedroom floor." This analysis is particularly pertinent given the increasing interest in the effects of environmental conditions on various biological and ecological processes. The metrics of Maximum temperature (°C) and Minimum temperature (°C) are essential for understanding these environmental shifts, as they offer insights into the thermal conditions that may influence both flora and fauna within this space.

page.content: Notably, the year 2006 serves as a reference point, where the recorded values indicate a Before measurement of 111,684.93 (1.96)* and an After measurement of 113,220.12 (1.98), reflecting a Difference of 1,535.19 and a Percent of Change of 1.37.
